title: bridge-jmap seen_ids not persisted; restart re-delivers up to 50 emails
description: The seen_ids dedup set is held in memory only. On process restart the set is empty, so the next email_query returns up to 50 recent email IDs that were already forwarded to nie in the previous session. All of them are re-sent to the nie relay as new Chat messages. Trigger: restart bridge-jmap while there are recently-polled emails in the mailbox.
close_reason: seen_ids persisted to disk; bounded to last 1000 IDs; atomic write-then-rename; restart no longer causes re-delivery
